perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a Costco warehouse aisle with several people walking by; a large Costco logo and a cartoon character (Wreck-It Ralph) are overlaid on the screen with promotional text. (2) A rapid series of cuts follows, each showcasing a specific product on a shelf or in a refrigerated case. Products include large boxes of MamyPoko diapers, bottles of vitamins and supplements, containers of laundry pods, packs of beer, bags of chocolates, snacks, and fresh meat/seafood packages. (3) Each product shot features a consistent graphic overlay showing the brand, original price, discount amount, and final special price. (4) The final shot shows a very large pink Disney Lotso plush bear sitting in a bin.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music with a steady rhythm begins immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) An energetic male voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing the weekly Costco specials and quickly narrating the names of the products and their discounted prices as they appear on screen. (3) No significant ambient noise or sound effects are heard over the loud BGM and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the narrator's speech. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large colorful titles at the start read 'Costco Weekly Specials Report', '02/25~03/02', and 'Remember to follow us'. (3) Content Text: Each product has a dedicated overlay with its name (e.g., 'MAMY POKO', 'ONE A DAY', 'Tide'), 'Original Price', 'Discount', and 'Special Price' in bold numbers.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product showcase with pricing -> Brief Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: A few shoppers are seen in the background of the intro and some hands are visible reaching for products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Various aisles of a Costco warehouse, including the diaper section, supplement shelves, refrigerated meat and seafood sections, and general merchandise areas.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a rapid-fire shopping guide for Costco Taiwan members, highlighting specific discounted items available during the week of February 25 to March 2. By combining visual proof of the discounts with an energetic narration, the content aims to drive foot traffic to the store and increase social media engagement for the 'Bill Special Envoy' (比爾特派員) brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear showcase of products with prices and explicit 'Special Price' labels.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of the 'Wreck-It Ralph' avatar and the 'Bill Special Envoy' branding.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video is optimized for short-form social media consumption (e.g., TikTok/Reels) with high-density information and fast pacing.
